title: Garbage Sorting 垃圾分类
scene: 邻居之间讨论垃圾分类

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Hi there, I noticed you are new to the building. Do you know about the garbage sorting rules here?
lines.cn: 你好，我注意到你是新搬来的。你知道这里的垃圾分类规定吗？

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Not really. I saw four different colored bins, but I am not sure what goes where. Can you help me?
lines.cn: 不太清楚。我看到四个不同颜色的垃圾桶，但不知道什么垃圾该扔哪里。你能帮我吗？

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Of course. The blue bin is for recyclables like paper, plastic bottles, and cans. The green bin is for food waste.
lines.cn: 当然。蓝色桶是放可回收物，比如纸、塑料瓶和易拉罐。绿色桶是厨余垃圾。

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: What about the brown bin? It looks bigger than the others.
lines.cn: 那棕色桶呢？看起来比其他的大。

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: The brown bin is for general waste. Things that cannot be recycled or composted go in there. The yellow one is for glass.
lines.cn: 棕色桶是其他垃圾。不能回收或堆肥的东西扔那里。黄色桶是放玻璃的。

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: That makes sense. What about pizza boxes? Are they recyclable?
lines.cn: 明白了。那披萨盒呢？可以回收吗？

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Only if they are clean. If they have grease or food on them, they go in the brown bin. The same goes for used napkins.
lines.cn: 干净的可以。如果有油污或食物残渣，就扔棕色桶。用过的餐巾纸也一样。

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Good to know. I want to do it right. When is the garbage collection day?
lines.cn: 知道了。我想做对。垃圾收集日是哪天？

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Recycling is collected every Tuesday and Friday. General waste is every Monday, Wednesday, and Saturday.
lines.cn: 可回收物每周二和周五收。其他垃圾是每周一、三、六。

lines.speaker: Neighbor
lines.content: Thank you so much. I really appreciate your help. This neighborhood seems very friendly.
lines.cn: 非常感谢。我真的很感激你的帮助。这个社区看起来很友好。
